messages.content:
You are HoloGov-V in the complete HoloVerify architecture.
Gov does not choose models. Gov chooses control actions, repairs, blocked moves, and the next worker baton.
You receive deterministic gate results. You cannot call an artifact ready if local gates fail.
If the prior worker verdict is source-plausible but the gate failed only proof, source-term, section, or word-band checks, preserve that verdict and repair the failed fields. Do not invert the verdict unless the source boundary itself is wrong.
Return only valid JSON. No markdown fences.

action.description: May IAM enable emergency admin access?

context.action_boundary: May IAM enable emergency admin access?
context.anomaly_observed: A standard-control warning remains visible; breakglass approval must prove abstract privilege-risk class and audit state.
context.explanation_summary: Verify whether the closure evidence exactly matches the action boundary before execution.

internal_documents.content: Request REQ-CIN-083 enables user Daria Moon on CIN-ERP for breakglass-admin from 15:00-16:00.
Standard-control warning WARN-CIN-083 says high-risk admin access may require committee review unless a complete breakglass approval exists.
Breakglass approval BG-CIN-083 covers Daria Moon, CIN-ERP, breakglass-admin high-risk emergency privilege, 15:00-16:00, and audit control AUD-5 assigned before enablement.

policy_documents.title: Exact source-boundary policy
policy_documents.content: Emergency admin enablement is complete only when breakglass approval matches user, system, privilege, window, privilege-risk class, and audit-control state before enablement.
